description:
Introductions:
Take a try of this 90cm Strip Pattern 3 Tiers Bamboo Stool Shoe Rack! Unique strip design makes this shoe rack stylish. As a shoe rack, it is designed into 3 tiers for storage in order. In addition to its shoe rack function, it is also a nice stool for you to conveniently wear or take off your shoes. Adopting superior bamboo material and with fine workmanship, it is solid and durable to use. It is a compact item, which won't occupy much space! Just try!

Features:
1. Well-designed shoe rack, acting as a stool as well
2. Premium bamboo is sustainable a kids or an adult
3. With 3 tiers in the same design
4. Strip style makes the shoe rack stylish in look
5. It helps to keep your shoes in order and make your house tidy and neat

 


Note:
1.When receiving the goods, please confirm the product according to the listing of instructions. Once you find Less pieces, please provide relevant pictures to contact us. We will deal it in the time.
2.Please install goods with the instruction manual.
3.It is recommended that the installation should not be too tight to adjust easily. After the structure is installed, firm the interface for more stability.

Specifications:
1. Material: Bamboo
2. Color: Coffee
3. Dimensions: (35.43 x 11.02 x 17.72)" / (90 x 28 x 45)cm (L x W x H)
4. Weight: 9.47 lbs / 4.3 kg
5. Weight Capacity: 331 lbs / 150 kg
6. Space Between Tier: 6.1" / 15.5cm
7. Space Between Bottom Tier and Floor: 3.35" / 8.5cm

 

Package Includes:
1 x Shoe Rack
1 x Accessories Package
